title: stephanomeria cinerea
intro: Stephanomeria cinerea, also known as Gray Whitestem or Gray Stephanomeria, is a perennial plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. It belongs to the sunflower family and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds. The plant's roots, leaves, and flowers are traditionally used in herbal preparations to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and digestive problems. Herbal preparations of Stephanomeria cinerea include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
